title: We are hosting a monday.com event in London April 20! Come join us

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Attention all businesses in London!
Join us for The Future of Work Management on April 20th, in collaboration with our partners monday.com and Make!

This on-site event is designed for businesses looking to streamline their workflows under one platform. You’ll hear from guest speakers who are experts in the industry, have access to live support sessions and demos with monday.com and Make experts, enjoy delicious food and drinks, and even catch some live entertainment.

Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity to network with other industry professionals and get first-hand insight into the future of work management! Sign up for the event below to secure your spot. We can’t wait to see you there!

Omnitas Consulting

Omnitas Event: The future of work management

We're hosting an event in London on the 20th of April in collaboration with our partners monday.com and Make. Limited seats - sign up today!

Est. reading time: 7 minutes

Agenda
12:00 Doors open
12:30 – 13:00 Shaked Hershkovitz will talk about trends in Work OS and monday.com value proposition.
13:00 – 13:30 Mingle, live demos, and support sessions.
13:30 – 14:00 Thomas Karlsson will speak about successful consolidations inside monday.com, supported by Make.
14:00 – 14:30 Mingle, live demos, and support sessions.
14:30 – 15:00 Richard Tonge from Lear Corp. will share their experience with implementing monday.com into their organization.
15:00 – 15:30 Mingle, live demos, and support sessions.
15:30 – 16:00 Lexi Niccolls from OVO Energy will share how their team, with monday.com, brought all operational processes to one platform.

16:00 – 16:30 Mingle, live demos, and support sessions.
16:30 – 17:00 Chen Salomon, R&D Director at monday.com, will run through the monday.com product roadmap for 2023.
17:00 – Live entertainment courtesy of Waiting Till Marriage, food, and drinks.

This event is your chance to unlock the tools and knowledge needed to revolutionize your workspace. Don’t miss out – sign up now!

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julia-monday.com please let me know if this is in the correct area. Can it be shared in announcements as well?

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml: I wish I could make it, I’m interested to hear Shaked Hershkovitz’s talk in particular !

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this. Still tickets left! Come join us, it is 100% Free.
